item.title: weekly picks (Jun 1 week 2026)
item.description:
A WordCloud of 2026 June 1st week collection

===This week’s pick===

  • Score : 22854

2606.03897v1 Parametrically induced strong coupling between a superconducting quantum circuit and a solid-state spin ensemble (arXiv)
